evidence.velocity_vs_rigour: Establishing documentation, version control, and data privacy compliance
evidence.velocity_vs_rigour_explanation: Governance, compliance, and CI/CD standards dominate with no velocity or speed-oriented language present.
evidence.domain_risk: Establishing documentation, version control, and data privacy compliance
evidence.domain_risk_explanation: Data privacy compliance is named but the JD is generic beyond that, without financial-reporting or regulatory-audit specifics — treated as moderate.
evidence.data_team_maturity: Promoting BI adoption and data literacy across EMEA
evidence.data_team_maturity_explanation: Region-wide BI adoption and an established EMEA headquarters function imply a mature, specialised data organisation.
evidence.jd_authorship: Strong hands-on experience with Snowflake and DBT
evidence.jd_authorship_explanation: Named tools (Snowflake, DBT, Azure Data Factory) sit alongside generic phrases like 'align with the overall business strategy', giving a mixed precision level.
evidence.stakeholder_orientation: Directing data integration and pipeline orchestration across the organization
evidence.stakeholder_orientation_explanation: The role centres on the data platform itself — pipelines, database performance, BI adoption — rather than a specific business function.
evidence.autonomy_level: Define and prioritise technical requirements that align with the overall business strategy
evidence.autonomy_level_explanation: Strategic verbs (define, direct, establish, promote) dominate the responsibilities section.
evidence.ai_role_explanation: No AI tooling or AI-consuming infrastructure mentioned anywhere in the posting.
evidence.testing_framing: No testing or data quality signal.
evidence.testing_framing_explanation: No testing, data contracts, or data quality framework language appears anywhere in the JD.
evidence.loss_aversion_framing: Establishing documentation, version control, and data privacy compliance
evidence.loss_aversion_framing_explanation: Moderate: data privacy compliance and documentation appear once but do not dominate the overall delivery-and-adoption framing.
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix: Enhancing database platform performance and cost-effectiveness
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix_explanation: Enhancing, directing, and promoting adoption of existing infrastructure points to fix/scale rather than greenfield build.
